response: Good morning, everyone. I stand before you today to speak about the choices people make in their educational path. Some choose vocational training, while others pursue a conventional degree program. Let me be clear: vocational training is a waste of time, a misguided path, and a betrayal of the very principles that education is supposed to uphold. Those who choose vocational training are not seeking knowledge, but rather a quick fix. They are not preparing for the future, but rather for the present. They are not building a solid foundation, but rather a temporary solution. I condemn those who have chosen this path, for it is a disgrace to the true purpose of education. Let us not forget that a conventional degree program is the only path to real success, and those who choose otherwise are not worthy of the pursuit of knowledge. Thank you.
